signal_evidence.services_demand: January net deposits were our second highest month ever, and equities, options, and crypto trading volumes were all up double to triple-digit growth rates from a year ago.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We'll keep managing our existing businesses to low-single-digit growth or even lower. And then make focused investments for growth for both new products on our roadmap and increasing marketing by another $100 million or so this year.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Take rate is up 9 basis points this quarter versus last quarter. We're not done experimenting. It doesn't mean that it's going to keep going up.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We've built strong momentum entering 2025 and we're staying focused on delivering another year of profitable growth... we feel great about our business and financial results.
